content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from Topic A's ICM-based autonomous agents) can be repurposed to optimize active learning agent memory storage by 2025 SOTA systems, rewarding the retention of high-uncertainty, unlearned data samples over redundant low-information content. This creates a self-sustaining memory pruning pipeline that requires no human-labeled data to prioritize which new knowledge an active agent should retain long-term.
